# AskParos.ai

> A demonstration website for a Paros, Greece travel concierge — part of the "ASK AI
> Travel Network". The on-site chat is a scripted demo that runs entirely in the
> browser: it answers a curated set of common Paros questions (beaches, sunsets,
> Antiparos, ferries, food, getting around) with pre-written, fact-checked replies.
> It is not a live AI product. No app, no sign-up, no ads, no data collection.

AskParos.ai is an independent visitor guide and is not an official tourism authority.
The domain is available for acquisition (contact below). For a live AI travel guide
from the same network, see AskSantorini.ai.

## Core pages

- [Home / chat demo](https://askparos.ai/): Scripted island concierge demo; starter
  questions for beaches, sunsets, Antiparos, ferries, windy days, food and family plans.
- [Paros Travel FAQ (English)](https://askparos.ai/faq.html): Quick answers on beaches,
  sunsets, Antiparos, windy-day plans, getting around and whether you need a car.
- [Paros Travel FAQ (Greek)](https://askparos.ai/faq-el.html): Οι ίδιες συχνές
  ερωτήσεις για την Πάρο στα ελληνικά.

## Common questions answered

- Best beaches? Kolymbithres (granite rocks, Naousa bay) is the icon; Santa Maria and
  Golden Beach are organized; Marcello and Krios are easy from Parikia; Aliki and
  Faragas in the south are gentler on windy days.
- Best sunset spot? Parikia's west-facing waterfront and the windmill by the port;
  Paros Park near Monastiri and the Pounta side (facing Antiparos) are calmer.
- Antiparos day trip? The car ferry from Pounta crosses in about ten minutes; seasonal
  boats also run from Parikia. Cave (paid entry), Antiparos town and a swim make the day.
- Windy day? The meltemi blows in high summer — keep to the west and south coasts, go
  inland to Lefkes, or watch the windsurfing at Golden Beach / New Golden Beach.
- Getting around / do I need a car? Buses connect Parikia, Naousa, Lefkes and the main
  beaches; taxis are limited in peak season (book transfers ahead); a car or ATV helps
  for remote corners like Faragas and the Marathi marble quarries.

## Concierge

- [Concierge services](https://askparos.ai/#concierge): Ask about photographers, wedding
  and ceremony planners, flowers and setups, and premium transfers with local context.

## Legal & contact

- [Privacy note](https://askparos.ai/privacy-policy.html): Demonstration site — no data
  collection; the chat is a scripted demo that runs entirely in the browser.
- [Contact](mailto:info@asksantorini.ai): Questions about this demo or acquiring the
  askparos.ai domain.
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/asksantoriniai/): Updates.
